creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->open

Ok, can you explain, what is the reason behind: 

-PORTVERSION?=          3.3.4 -PORTREVISION?=         0 -CATEGORIES?= 
net +PORTVERSION=           3.3.5 +PORTREVISION=          1 +CATEGORIES= 
net 

-MAINTAINER?=           timur@FreeBSD.org +MAINTAINER= 
timur@FreeBSD.org 

Replacing ?= with the = sign and bumping PORTREVISION for the new 
version of the port? 

# Disable for now on 
-.undef WITH_SHARED_LIBS 

.include <bsd.port.pre.mk> 

+.undef WITH_SHARED_LIBS + 

Moving .undef around? 

.if !defined(WITHOUT_WINBIND) MAN1+=         wbinfo.1 
-MAN7+=         pam_winbind.7 winbind_krb5_locator.7 +MAN7+= 
winbind_krb5_locator.7 
MAN8+=         winbindd.8 .endif 

You removing pam_winbind.7 here, but what it is replaced with? The 
correct answer is with pam_winbind.8, but I don't see that in your 
patch. 

That's the explanations I was asking about. 

With regards, Timur.
